reviews.review_description: i absolutely love the game don't get me wrong i made a whole discord server and it is supposed to hold records, for example let's say you go to "waves (pretty hard)" and you get to wave 35 or up you could get on the global leader board in my discord. i would absolutely love if you joined it!😁 https://discord.gg/MXSGYdHpgD

When I first got this game, I was not really expecting much, just found it randomly why scrolling though da meta store. But... Once I played it this game turned out to be absolute cinema 🔥❤️‍🩹 I get SO much joy out of  destroying these little yippees for DAYS. Also the ost is so fire! 🔥 I hope I lowkey find it somewhere or da names cuz it's so peak but if I go in game would have to lowkey run from the yippes like the flash lol, but overall peak game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! <3

reviews.review_description: I did it. I walked all the way to the end of the long bridge. And got pizza. It was worth it. Every second was great. I will be playing this game again. Yipee. Ilove this game. Bye.

developer_response.body: Awesome!!!

reviews.review_description: The only issue this game has is killing the yippies. It's confusing they can block your attacks with their swords but they can kill you if you try to block. I try to go behind them and it barely works. also 2 second cool downs or spawning them a little further away sometimes I'll get killed by a yippee I didnt even know existed because it spawned right behind me💔 the game is pretty fun and distracting.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Good feedback. Blocking in the remake is heavily tipped in the players favor in the remake, so be on the lookout for the release sometime soon. I haven't found a solution for enemies spawning behind you but I'm looking into it.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game, it's just.. It could use like a multiplayer level. And more stuff. It's an absolutely great game, it could just use some improvements.

developer_response.body: No multiplayer.

this game is great but it lacks weapons and enemies
it would be really awesome if this game had more variety of weapons and enemies like a grapple system would be awesome and add like bosses for every 10 waves and also make caverns brighter and better

developer_response.body: I agree! In the remake, there is 2 more weapons and plans for new enemy types. I also hear plenty about cavern, so I’ll see what I can do.

Okay I've litterally been here since day 2 of this

developer_response.body: Sadly, no more updates are coming to this version of the game. However, a remake has been in progress for a bit, but I have no idea when its coming. Thanks for being a long term fan.

developer_response.body: I'll see what I can do in the remake! (probably make it so if you press down on a thumb-stick then it'll switch to that controller/hand)

reviews.review_description: W game but a better wave system needed, and hitboxes needs updates, but a boss and an upgrade system would be awesome, but the most needed thing is life steal and Multiplayer

developer_response.body: NO MULTIPLAYER!!! Your other suggestions are really good though! I'll address how all of these are going in the remake currently in development. First of all, waves have been completely reworked to function a little more like COD Zombies (enemy multipliers, accurate scaling). Secondly, I totally agree that the original hitboxes are atrocious. This is something that I've (hopefully) fixed in the remake. Boss fights are something that would be awesome in a game like this, but I'm not sure if I've got the time or energy to implement something like that without knowing how to approach it. Upgrades are the same story; It'd be awesome, but I'd stay cautious. Finally, healing is something TERRIBLY needed in the original, but not so much the remake because you have plenty more health (3HP to 100 HP). Thanks for the review and suggestions, I'll try my best to consider these.

reviews.review_description:
It has really good game play and can be fun if you have no idea what to do. if I'm ever offline or if gorilla tag is updating, This is my go to game! It's a creative game and has no bugs. However, the game has not much to offer and can be VERY repetitive on what to do in the game, there aren't any game modes or anything. But besides the game being basic. I give it 3/5 stars! Could use some work tho.

Edit:The developer just responded to me, can't wait for the next update! :D

reviews.review_description: I played this for the first time today not expecting much, but this was actually hilarious to play and fun too surprisingly challenging. If you see this game and read the reviews, you should play it if you’re a fan of gorilla tag and blade and sorcery or beat saber it should be right up your alley. Has the movement of gorilla tag and the combat where you have to use a sword, which is why I would suggest You should probably play beat saber first so you understand how to use the blade properly.

reviews.review_description:
i haven’t played gorilla tag in a long time. i’ve only played beat saber for the last 5 months. it’s so fun and stupid and also incredibly hard. where to swing? 🤷‍♂️. if their hp increases? 🤷‍♂️. how to move properly? 🤷‍♂️. the concept is so stupid you can’t say it’s not fun. wonder what this looks like on the quest 3. i anticipate future updates🫡 

I LOVE BREAKCORE💖💖💖💖💖💖

developer_response.body:
it looks the same on quest 3 🪦 also:

where to swing - the body! the swords have sphere colliders so you cant just easily swing past the thin sword. i’d suggest jumping over them and swinging downward to get a clean strike.
does their hp increase? - no, they all die in one hit.
how to move properly - im gonna be honest idk how to even explain this one, just dissect the tutorial text like ur game theory or smth idk 💔

anywayz thx for gud review, maybe new update with campaign idk

reviews.review_description:
Very simple and easy to understand game but can get difficult at streets, graphics are horrid but the ai is worse, but still, very functional, and actually makes sense in this scenario.
the blocking requires skill to overcome, and the hordes easily get out of hand if not dealt with. 9/10 game, feels spoopy in caves tho

reviews.review_title: I think I fell in love, but…
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game, but I think that they should add multiplayer and revamp cavern. I think cavern should have a bit more detail and multiplayer mode would be awesome! Cavern is a bit too dark to play in and my friend keeps complaining that there’s no multiplayer. But after all that I still love the game and I play it everyday. Also can you make more maps?

developer_response.body: It's a common criticism that cavern is too dark, so that's fine. Multiplayer would be too difficult and not worth it.
